monthlyCharts__insight_body: Charts displaying work data for the past 30 days.
monthlyCharts__prediction_desc: Smart baseline prediction based on your 30-day velocity trend.
monthlyCharts__prediction_help_content: This forecast uses Linear Regression to analyze your daily task completion velocity over the last 30 days. It projects a baseline for the next 30 days based on your current momentum. The confidence level shows how consistent your work pattern is (higher r-squared value).

settings__subtitle: Admin workspace controls and account management.
settings__general_subtitle: Central place for administrator-level controls, account context, and operational shortcuts.
settings__storage_subtitle: Monitor the configured asset bucket, estimated capacity usage, and the retention posture for uploaded files.
settings__storage_metric_bucket_helper: Primary object storage bucket currently used for attachments.
settings__storage_metric_used_helper: Estimated used capacity from the current admin snapshot.
settings__storage_metric_remaining_helpe: Estimated free capacity before the configured quota is reached.
settings__storage_metric_retention_helpe: Suggested retention window for stale uploads and cleanup reviews.
settings__storage_bucket_subtitle: Current object storage target for task attachments and uploaded assets.
settings__storage_files_subtitle: Browse objects stored in the bucket and remove files when needed.
settings__storage_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete {key}? This action cannot be undone.
settings__storage_empty: No files found in this bucket.
settings__storage_attention_subtitle: Operational reminders for keeping file storage healthy.
settings__storage_attention_usage: Usage and remaining capacity shown here are estimates until backend telemetry exposes real quota metrics.
settings__storage_attention_policy: Review large uploads, generated reports, and legacy attachments regularly to avoid silent storage growth.
settings__storage_attention_review: If you use a custom bucket or quota, store those values in local admin settings so this page reflects your environment.
settings__storage_attention_quota_missin: Used space is real-time from backend, but remaining space requires STORAGE_QUOTA_GB to be configured on the backend.

login__hero_desc: Sign in to continue managing your tasks and collaborate with your team securely.
login__subtitle: Welcome back! Please enter your details.
login__privacy_content: Your privacy is important to us. This system runs as a self-hosted instance on a private server. Your data is stored on this server. Please take precautions to keep your sensitive information and passwords secure.
login__terms_content: By using this application, you agree to take responsibility for your own data. This system is a self-hosted tool for internal management. We do not provide guarantees against data loss or damage. Users should maintain their own backups.

create__subtitle: Create a new user and assign permissions.

page__no_access_desc: You don't have permission to view this page.
